Agentic AI  ·  No Silos  ·  No Leakage  ·  UAE & MENA

Your business has gaps.
Revenue leaks through them every day.

Silos between departments. Tools that don't connect.
Decisions made without the full picture.

This isn't a technology problem — it's a systems problem, and agentic AI is a genuinely positive way to solve it. Neural Horizons AI implements AI that finds your gaps, closes the leaks, and connects your business end to end — with your team firmly in control.

20+Global Clients
98%Client Satisfaction
AED 9M+Revenue Generated
15+Years Experience
⚡ Take Free AI Audit See How We Work
Ecosystem Intelligence

AI doesn't have to be scary. Here's what it actually is — and where we put it to work.

No jargon. Four plain-English terms — including the one everyone confuses it with, AGI — then the real map of every sector we apply this to responsibly.

Scroll to begin

Click each stop to explore

Step 1 of 4

Artificial Intelligence

Software that spots patterns in data and makes a prediction or suggestion — the same idea behind spell-check, spam filters and route planning. A tool. Not a mind of its own.

In practice

Flags an unusual invoice before it's paid, suggests the next best action on a stalled deal, or spots a compliance document about to expire.

You've used it safely for years without noticing.

Step 2 of 4

Agentic AI

AI that carries out a multi-step task for you — chasing a lead, reconciling an invoice, drafting a report — inside limits your team sets. A tireless junior colleague, not a decision-maker above you.

In practice

Follows up a cold lead over three emails, reconciles last month's invoices against the ledger, or drafts a first version of a client report — then hands it to a teammate to approve.

It does the repetitive work, so your people do the judgment work.

Step 3 of 4

Autonomous AI

The system runs a defined workflow end-to-end without a click each time — always inside guardrails, with full logging and an off-switch your team controls. Autonomy of task, never autonomy from accountability.

In practice

Runs the nightly reconciliation end-to-end, escalates only the exceptions that need a human, and logs every action for audit — with a single switch to pause it at any time.

Full visibility. Full control. Every time.

Step 4 of 4 · The one we don't build

AGI (Artificial General Intelligence)

AGI describes a system with human-level breadth — able to reason, learn and apply judgement across almost any task or domain, not just the ones it was built for. It wouldn't need to be configured for a new problem; it would understand context and novelty the way a capable person does. No lab or company has built this. It does not exist today, and there is no reliable date for when — or whether — it will.

Why this matters to you

AGI is usually the “AI” people picture when they're afraid of it — something that replaces judgement everywhere, all at once. That is not what shows up in your business. What you actually deploy is agentic or autonomous AI: bounded to a task, supervised, and switched off with one click.

The fear is about AGI. What runs in your business is agentic AI — narrower, supervised, and real today.

“Will it replace my team?”

No — it removes the copy-pasting and chasing so your team spends more time on strategy and relationships.

“Will we lose control?”

Every workflow we build has defined limits, human checkpoints on anything material, and a full audit log.

“Is our data safe?”

Governance is designed in from day one — access controls, residency and compliance reviewed before anything goes live.

One intelligence layer. Every sector, connected.

Agentic AI isn't one product bolted onto one department. Done well, it's a connected intelligence layer that adapts across an entire ecosystem — responsibly, in every sector we work in. Click a sector to see how.

Ecosystem
Intelligence
Governance & Compliance AI Training & Workforce AI Education Sustainability & ESG Digital Finance Retail & CX Healthcare Real Estate & Hospitality Cybersecurity

Hover a sector to pause the orbit · click to explore how we approach it

This is also the thinking behind SIB Consulting, where Lisa Warren serves as AI Agentic Lead — applying the same connected, responsible-AI approach at a cross-industry level.

Recognition

Trusted, featured, and recognised for the work.

We don't collect quotes — we let the coverage and the credentials speak for the approach.

The Prime Today · 2026

Most Influential and Dynamic Leader to Watch in 2026

Stanford

AI Leadership Programme, completed by our founder

Green Economy

Board Member & Partnership on responsible AI and sustainability

SIB Consulting

Lisa also serves as AI Agentic Lead, applying this approach cross-industry
“

The biggest risk with agentic AI isn't the model — it's rolling it out with no governance and no upskilling. The businesses winning with agentic AI this year aren't the ones with the flashiest tools. They're the ones who governed it properly and trained their people to run it. That's not caution. That's how you scale AI safely.

Lisa Warren

Founder & CEO, Neural Horizons AI

👩‍💼
Sound familiar?

The gaps costing you
revenue right now.

Most UAE businesses aren't losing to competitors. They're losing to their own disconnected systems.

Tap each card to watch the problem turn into the fix

0 of 6 gaps closed — tap a card to begin
1

Leads disappear between teams

A prospect shows interest on Tuesday. By Friday no one has followed up. Sales blames marketing. Marketing blames ops. The lead is cold — and the gap wins again.

Tap to see the fix
How we close it

We implement an agentic AI layer that monitors every lead in real time — qualifying, routing, and following up automatically across every channel. No lead falls through again.

Back to the problem
2

Your team is doing machine work

Copy-pasting between systems. Re-entering data. Chasing approvals manually. 30–40% of your team's day goes to tasks that should never need a human at all.

Tap to see the fix
How we close it

We map every manual workflow and replace it with agentic automation. Your team stops being data-entry operators and starts doing the work only humans can do.

Back to the problem
3

Decisions made without the full picture

Finance acts without ops data. Sales forecasts without the marketing pipeline. Every department has a piece of the truth — but no one can see the whole thing.

Tap to see the fix
How we close it

We connect your systems with agentic AI that gives every decision-maker a unified view. Real-time. Cross-department. No more decisions made blind.

Back to the problem
4

AI tools you paid for aren't delivering

You've bought the subscriptions. They sit in one department, disconnected from everything else. Tools without architecture are expensive noise.

Tap to see the fix
How we close it

We audit what you have, retire what isn't working, and architect the connections between tools that make the whole system actually function together.

Back to the problem
5

Growth stalled despite good revenue

The business is making money but not scaling. The ceiling isn't the market — it's internal. Silos are quietly capping what's possible and nobody can see where.

Tap to see the fix
How we close it

We run Zonar™ — our revenue diagnostic — to map exactly where your growth is being blocked. Then we remove the blockers with agentic AI that scales with you.

Back to the problem
6

12 months of AI meetings. Zero action.

You know AI is important. You've been in the meetings. Nothing concrete has happened. The uncertainty is costing more than the action would.

Tap to see the fix
How we close it

The Free AI Audit takes 2 minutes. You get an instant personalised report showing your #1 highest-ROI AI opportunity. That ends the uncertainty — and starts the action.

Back to the problem
Find My Gaps — Free AI Audit

2 minutes · Instant personalised report · No obligation

How We Work

From "we have gaps" to
"AI is closing them" — in weeks.

We don't send reports and disappear. We find the gaps, design the system, and implement it. You leave with AI that's actually running.

1

Free AI Audit — we find your gaps

Takes 2 minutes online. Zonar™ analyses your business profile and generates an instant personalised report — your top 3 revenue leaks and the highest-ROI fix. No generic advice. Specific to your business.

2 minutes · Free · Instant
2

30-minute call — we confirm the priority

Lisa walks through your audit results with you. No pitch. Just a clear conversation about your #1 gap, what's causing it, and what fixing it is worth. You leave with a specific recommendation — not a proposal.

30 minutes · Free · No obligation
3

We design the agentic system

We design the AI architecture that closes your specific gap — which agents, which workflows, which integrations. A clear blueprint your whole team can see and understand. Not a 60-page strategy document.

1–2 weeks
4

We implement it. It runs.

We build and deploy the agentic system in your business. Not a pilot. Not a proof of concept. A live system closing gaps from day one. Your team is trained. You have full visibility. We don't disappear.

4–12 weeks · Live results
Real Results

What happens when
the gaps close.

Real outcomes from real businesses. No projections. What actually happened.

Lead conversion increase

Lead generation growth

What's actually happening in AI, explained plainly.

Latest · 15 July 2026

Wednesday AI Insights — The World Starts Writing AI's Rulebook

UAE eases chip export rules and merges AI policy under one federal authority. Saudi's HUMAIN partners with Cohere and xAI. OpenAI pitches Washington a 5% equity stake. And only 8% of organisations have real AI governance.

Read article
Deep Dive · AI Governance · 15 July 2026

AI Governance Isn't Optional Anymore

Only 8% of organisations have a real AI governance framework, even though 88% are already running AI in production.

 Friday AI Insights · 10 July 2026

The AI Race Is Becoming a Control Race

UAE sovereign agentic AI goes operational with G42-Microsoft. Plus: Lisa Warren named Top AI Innovation Leader of the Year 2026.
About Lisa Warren

Built by someone who's
done the work.

15+ years turning data into strategy — from €2.24 trillion in assets under management at Amundi, to Ireland's largest retailer, to global cybersecurity across MENA and APAC. One constant: finding the gaps where value quietly disappears, and closing them.

I founded Neural Horizons AI because most UAE businesses aren't failing because of bad strategy. They're failing because their sales, marketing and operations teams have never been properly connected. Agentic AI fixes that — if you implement it right, with people kept firmly in charge.

✓ Named One to Watch in 2026 — International Business Media

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Everything you need to know about our AI consulting services

Neural Horizons AI is a specialist agentic AI and digital transformation consultancy based in Dubai, UAE. We find the gaps between your departments — where revenue leaks, where silos form, where AI should be working but isn't — and we close them through implementation, not just advice.

We find your gaps

Zonar™ diagnostic maps exactly where your revenue is leaking and why

We design the agentic system

Which agents, which workflows, which integrations — specific to your business

We implement it

A live system closing gaps from day one. Not a pilot. Not a report.

  • Quick Wins (1-2 months): Process automation, first workflow live
  • Standard Projects (3-6 months): Multi-department agentic AI
  • Enterprise Solutions (6-12 months): Full Zonar OS deployment

We start with the Free AI Audit to identify the fastest path to value.

Financial Services

Banking, fintech, insurance automation

E-Commerce & Retail

Customer personalization, inventory optimization

Healthcare

Diagnostic AI, patient management systems

Real Estate & Hospitality

Smart buildings, guest experience optimization

Digital Finance & ESG

Sustainability reporting, capital allocation

Education & Training

Personalised learning, workforce upskilling

  • Technical Support: 24/7 monitoring, troubleshooting, and system optimization
  • Continuous Improvement: Regular model retraining, performance tuning, and feature enhancements
  • Strategic Advisory: Quarterly reviews and roadmap planning
We implement, not just advise: We find your gaps and close them with live agentic AI — not just a report.
Proven Track Record: AED 9M+ in documented ROI, 98% satisfaction rate across UAE and MENA.
Regional Expertise: Deep understanding of UAE market dynamics and the 2026 AI mandate.
Founder-led: Lisa Warren works directly on every engagement. 15+ years experience.
